test.name: Sort products price low to high

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'class=product_sort_container' by label Price (low to high).
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get all products
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: Symbols not available. kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Veryfy price low to high sorting
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
